privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataText: YouSouq is committed to protecting users' privacy. We do not collect or store any personally identifiable information.
privacy.stored: The information entered when posting ads (name, WhatsApp) is only used to facilitate contact between buyers and sellers. This data is not retained on our servers after the transaction.
privacy.cookiesText: We do not use any tracking cookies or technologies that allow user identification. Our platform operates without collecting behavioral data.
privacy.complianceText: In accordance with Law 09-08 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data (CNDP) and ANRT regulations, we guarantee that:
points: No personal data is collected without explicit consent
Data is not shared with third parties
Users have the right to delete their data at any time
We do not sell data for commercial purposes
privacy.contactText: For any questions about this policy, contact us through available channels on the platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By using YouSouq, you accept these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our platform.
terms.serviceText: YouSouq is a marketplace platform allowing users to post and view used product ads in Morocco. The service is provided free of charge.
responsibilitiesPoints: Not post illegal, offensive or fraudulent content
Use WhatsApp only for legitimate communications
terms.liabilityText: YouSouq acts as a neutral intermediary. We are not responsible for transactions between users nor for the quality of advertised products. Users are encouraged to verify products before purchase.
terms.modificationText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect immediately after posting.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by Moroccan law. Any dispute will be subject to the competent jurisdictions of Morocco.
